full_text:
Bian Tong (Jianye) 卞統 (建業)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bian Tong (卞統), styledJianye (建業), was born in Yuanqu county, Jiyin commandery. Governed Nan commandery, his descendants would be prominent in Jin. Bian Tong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Bian Tong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
